recommendations.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding 2
recommendations.overview: The continuing adventures of the Portokalos family. A follow-up to the 2002 comedy, "My Big Fat Greek Wedding."

recommendations.title: Waking Ned
recommendations.overview: When a lottery winner dies of shock, his fellow townsfolk attempt to claim the money.

recommendations.title: I Swear
recommendations.overview: Diagnosed with Tourette Syndrome at 15, John Davidson navigates his way against the odds through troubled teenage years and into adulthood, finding inspiration in the kindness of others to discover his true purpose in life.

recommendations.title: Everybody's Fine

recommendations.title: Mary Poppins
recommendations.overview: In turn of the century London, a magical nanny employs music and adventure to help two neglected children become closer to their father.

recommendations.title: Nanny McPhee and the Big Bang

recommendations.title: Ilo Ilo
recommendations.overview: During the late 1990s, a busy working-class Singaporean couple hires a Filipino woman as a maid and nanny to their young son.

recommendations.title: The Truth About Love Is...
recommendations.overview: Dora, raises her two children with the help of her eccentric family, free-spirited best friend, and a charming poet-turned- nanny.

recommendations.title: My Mom Is a Character
recommendations.overview: After another spat with her kids, Dona Hermínia decides to take some time off from them and hides away in her aunt's house, where she reminisces about her kids in an age when they still needed her.
